invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破82（支撑位）或融资费率转正且Z-score超100%，则趋势跟随失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 82 (support) or funding rate turns positive with Z-score above 100%, negating the trend scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破65000（支撑位）或融资费率Z-score超100%，则趋势跟随失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 65000 (support) or funding rate Z-score exceeds 100%, negating the trend scenario.

invalidation.zh: 如果价格跌破0.095（支撑位）或融资费率转正且Z-score超100%，则轧空剧本失效。
invalidation.en: Invalidation if price breaks below 0.095 (support) or funding rate turns positive with Z-score above 100%, negating the squeeze scenario.
